coverage_model.level_0_standard_backbone: Every expected DIS 6 and DIS 7 PDU enum value exists in the manifest.
coverage_model.level_1_schema_ir: Every row is connected to XML/IR schema or explicitly marked schema gap.
coverage_model.level_2_safe_ingest: Every standard PDU can be header parsed, length checked, counted, and safely skipped.
coverage_model.level_3_generic_endpoint: Every standard PDU has a generic endpoint behavior.
coverage_model.level_4_field_visitor: Schema-backed generated catalog rows have generated field visitors.
coverage_model.level_5_typed_parser: High-value rows have typed parsers; currently Entity State only.
coverage_model.level_6_full_semantic: Full semantic support remains opt-in by typed parser waves.
